content: أنا مَكسوف مِن اِللي عَمَلتُه في اِلحَفلَة اِللي فاَتِت
translations: eng:I am ashamed about what I did at the last party

transcriptions.arabizi: 'ana maksoof min il-li Aamalt|uh fiilhafla il-li faetit
